results.title: Post 239 softball closes out summer season
results.description: VIRGINIA—The Post 239 American Legion softball team closed out their summer season with eight games over three days this past weekend and ended things on a positive note.

results.title: Sturm Graz 4-0 Hearts: Player ratings, defensive issues, Arnold Schwarzenegger and a message for the SFA - Edinburgh News
results.description: Sturm Graz 4-0 Hearts: Player ratings, defensive issues, Arnold Schwarzenegger and a message for the SFA Edinburgh News Champions League qualifiers LIVE: Sturm Graz v Hearts - radio, text updates, team news, reaction & stats BBC Sturm Graz 4-0 Hearts: Wouter Vrancken's first game as Jam Tarts boss ends in chastening Champions League qualifying defeat Sky Sports Champions League qualifying predictions, odds and tips: Hearts can get off to a solid start Racing Post Supporter Information: Sturm Graz (A) Hearts FC
